'''zhapoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hicksploitation|hicksploitation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hicksploitation|hicksploitation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhapoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæpeheth|zhæpeheth]] || [[word:zhæpehej|zhæpehej]] || [[word:zhæpehesh|zhæpehesh]] || [[word:zhæpehe|zhæpehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhapopohoth|zhapopohoth]] || [[word:zhapopohoj|zhapopohoj]] || [[word:zhapopohosh|zhapopohosh]] || [[word:zhapopoho|zhapopoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhapohoth|zhapohoth]] || [[word:zhapohoj|zhapohoj]] || [[word:zhapohosh|zhapohosh]] || [[word:zhapoho|zhapoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhapofhofth|zhapofhofth]] || [[word:zhapofhofj|zhapofhofj]] || [[word:zhapofhofsh|zhapofhofsh]] || [[word:zhapofhof|zhapofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhapohotho|zhapohotho]] || [[word:zhapohojo|zhapohojo]] || [[word:zhapohosho|zhapohosho]] || [[word:zhapohoko|zhapohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhapohoth|zhapohoth]] || [[word:zhapohoj|zhapohoj]] || [[word:zhapohosh|zhapohosh]] || [[word:zhapoho|zhapoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhapohothol|zhapohothol]] || [[word:zhapohojol|zhapohojol]] || [[word:zhapohoshol|zhapohoshol]] || [[word:zhapohokol|zhapohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhapohoothotho|zhapohoothotho]] || [[word:zhapohoojojo|zhapohoojojo]] || [[word:zhapohooshosho|zhapohooshosho]] || [[word:zhapohooko|zhapohooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhapohothon|zhapohothon]] || [[word:zhapohojon|zhapohojon]] || [[word:zhapohoshon|zhapohoshon]] || [[word:zhapohokon|zhapohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhapohothooro|zhapohothooro]] || [[word:zhapohojooro|zhapohojooro]] || [[word:zhapohoshooro|zhapohoshooro]] || [[word:zhapohokooro|zhapohokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|c579b50}}
